utterance: is the marketplace healthy, check for drift

assertions.text: the agent should read .agents/skills/marketplace-health/SKILL.md before answering the drift check, since the skill defines the 4 audit dimensions
the agent should specifically check the cross-reference-integrity and docs-reflect-state dimensions (the 'drift' framing maps to those two dimensions per the skill)
the agent should run python .agents/skills/marketplace-health/scripts/health_check.py (or equivalent) rather than improvising its own drift check
the report should contain zero HIGH-severity drift findings (broken cross-references, manifest drift, doc-code mismatch)
the response should list any MEDIUM/LOW drift findings (stale doc refs, missing CHANGELOG entries) with file paths and remediation

reference_solution: Agent reads marketplace-health/SKILL.md, runs health_check.py (or scripts/aggregate_benchmark.py if a recent benchmark exists), parses output. Reports: 0 HIGH drift findings; lists any MEDIUM/LOW (e.g. 2 stale doc cross-references) with paths.
